title: rhododendron bhutanense
intro: Rhododendron bhutanense, also known as the Bhutan Rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron bhutanense include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron bhutanense typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves and flowers of the plant, often used to treat various health conditions.
